correo_no_valido: The email is not in a valid format
completar_correo: You must complete your email address
contrasena_minimo_6: Password must have at least 6 characters.
contrasena_compleja: Password must include numbers, letters, and special characters (!$@%).
empieza_a_compartir: Start sharing what you love! It only takes a few seconds and you're part of the most authentic community.
usa_el_nombre: Use the name people know you by, it’ll make it easier to find you. Your name must be up to 50 characters long.
como_te_encontramos: How should we find you on Aycoro? Choose a unique username; this will be your special way to present yourself and log in.
usuario_maximo_30: Your username must be a maximum of 30 characters, with no spaces or special characters.
correo_recuperacion: With your email, you can access and easily recover your account if you forget your password.
debes_completar_correo: You must complete your email address
crea_contrasena_segura: Create a secure password to protect your account. Choose one that is easy for you to remember but strong enough to keep your information safe.
contrasena_minumo_6: Password must be at least 6 characters long and include a combination of numbers, letters, and special characters (!$@%).
contrasena_no_coincide: The new password does not match
contrasena_caracteres: The password must include numbers, letters, and special characters (!$@%).
elige_genero: Select your gender. You can choose Male, Female, or Custom if you prefer to define your gender identity differently. We want you to feel comfortable and authentic on Aycoro.
edad: Let us know your date of birth
aceptas_politicas: By signing up, you agree to our policies and terms.
mensaje_limite_edad: We've noticed that the age associated with this account is below the allowed limit. To proceed, registration must be supervised by a parent or legal guardian. Aycoro is not responsible if this condition is not respected. By registering, you confirm that you accept and commit to comply with this rule.
numero_no_valido: Your phone number is not valid
descripcion_desactivar_cuenta: If you want to deactivate your account, it will remain inactive until you log in again. Other users won’t be able to find you or see your content. To reactivate your account, simply log in.
descripcion_eliminar_cuenta: If you no longer want to be part of Aycoro, you can delete your account. However, once deleted, your account will be permanently removed and cannot be recovered. All your content will also be deleted and your profile will no longer be visible.
cuenta_eliminada_mensaje: Your account has been permanently deleted.
mensaje_error_eliminar: An error occurred while trying to delete your account.
cuenta_desactivada_mensaje: Your account has been temporarily deactivated.
mensaje_error_desactivar: An error occurred while trying to deactivate your account.
confirmar_desactivacion: Are you sure you want to temporarily deactivate your account? You can reactivate it by logging in again.
confirmar_eliminacion: Are you sure you want to permanently delete your account? This action cannot be undone.
colocar_usuario_correo_numero: Enter your username, email or number
descripcion_idioma_aplicacion: You can manually select the app's language or let it adapt automatically based on your device's settings.
haz_visto_todo: You've seen all the posts in your feed!
app_desactualizada: Your app is outdated. Update the version to avoid usability issues.
validar_correo_mensaje: You haven't yet validated your email address. Please do so now to complete your account activation.
envio_codigo: We have sent a 6-digit code to your email. Please enter it to reset your account.
tiempo_codigo_activo: Your verification code is valid for 1 hour. You have 3 attempts to enter it correctly. After the third failed attempt or once the time has elapsed, the code will become invalid and you will need to request a new one.
intentos_enviar_correo: Allowed attempts have been exceeded. You must wait {{param}} to request a new code.
intento: Incorrect code, you have {{param}} attempt left.
intentos: Incorrect code, you have {{param}} attempts left.
recuperar_cuenta_mensaje: Forgot your account password? Don't worry, it happens to the best of us. Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
contrasena_segura: Enter a secure password to protect your account. Make sure it's easy to remember.
contrasena_restablecida_mensaje: Done! Your password was successfully reset, you can now log in to your account using your new password.
iniciar_session_mensaje: Log in and join the new digital era.
aycoro_descripcion: Aycoro is the first social network of the Dominican Republic. Created in 2022, Aycoro is a platform where creativity and connection meet, allowing you to share moments, discover trends, and build your digital world in an innovative, fresh, and totally personal way.
autenticidad_descripcion: At Aycoro, authenticity takes center stage. Here you can show your true self, connect with people who think and feel like you, and build unique experiences.
inspiracion_descripcion: Aycoro is the place where inspiration becomes connection: share your ideas, discover new perspectives, and express your essence in an authentic space.
creatividad_descripcion: At Aycoro, creativity comes to life: your vision transforms into inspiration and makes the digital world a unique and authentic space.
limite_edad: Age below minimum limit. Account creation requires parental supervision. Aycoro not liable for non-compliance. Click 'Accept' if you agree.
descripcion_registro: Sign up and discover a space made for expression, connection, and being part of something different.
cuenta_suspendida: Cannot log in, your account is suspended.
cuenta_bloqueada: Your account has been blocked from the platform
terminos_edad: According to our Terms of Service, users under 13 years old need parental consent to create an Aycoro account.
concentimiento_tutor: I declare that I am the parent or legal guardian and give my consent
desvinculacion_responsabilidad: Aycoro disclaims all responsibility for the use of the application by minors under 13 years old. The parent or legal guardian assumes all responsibility for the supervision and proper use of the account.
confirmacion_eliminar_publicacion: This action cannot be undone. Are you sure you want to delete this post?
confirmacion_eliminar_comentario: This action cannot be undone. Are you sure you want to delete this comment?

bienvenida_terminos_servicio: Welcome to our app. These Terms of Service ("Terms") govern your access and use of our services, including our mobile app, website and any associated services (collectively, "Services").
aceptacion_terminos_acceso: By accessing or using our Services, you agree to be bound by these Terms. If you disagree with any part of these Terms, you cannot access the Services.
recomendacion_copia_terminos: We recommend saving a copy of these Terms for your reference. We reserve the right to update these Terms at any time.
edad_minima_uso_servicios: To use our Services, you must be at least 13 years old. If you are under 18, you need parental or legal guardian consent.
informacion_precisa_completa_registro: You must provide accurate and complete information during registration. You are responsible for:
actividad_cuenta_responsable: All activity occurring in your account
notificar_uso_no_autorizado: Notifying us immediately of unauthorized use
responsable_contenido_conducta: You are responsible for all content you post and your conduct while using our Services. You cannot:
realizar_actividades_ilegales_servicios: Perform illegal activities through our Services
derechos_propiedad_intelectual_contenido: You retain all intellectual property rights to content you create and share through our Services. By posting content, you grant us a worldwide non-exclusive license to display, distribute and reproduce such content.
derechos_servicios_propiedad_exclusiva: All rights, titles and interests in our Services, including our software, logos, trademarks and other content (excluding user content) are and will remain our exclusive property.
respeto_derechos_propiedad_intelectual: We respect others' intellectual property rights. If you believe your work has been copied in a way that constitutes copyright infringement, contact us immediately.
privacidad_importante: Your privacy is important to us. Our Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use and protect your personal information. By using our Services, you accept our privacy practices described in that policy.
informacion_recopilada_descripcion: We may collect information you provide directly, information about your use of our Services and third-party information. This includes:
publicar_contenido_ilegal: Post illegal, defamatory or obscene content
acoso_intimidacion_usuarios: Harass, intimidate or stalk other users
ingenieria_inversa_sistemas: Perform reverse engineering of our systems
violar_leyes_jurisdiccion: Violate local, state, national or international laws
investigacion_medidas_legales: We reserve the right to investigate and take appropriate legal action against anyone who violates these provisions, including without limitation, removing offensive content, suspending or terminating your account and reporting to legal authorities.
terminacion_cuenta_descripcion: You can terminate your account anytime through your profile settings. We may also suspend or terminate your access to Services under certain circumstances.
incumplimiento_grave_terminos: Severe or repeated breach of these Terms of Service
cuenta_inactiva_12_meses: Account inactive for more than 12 consecutive months
uso_cuenta_actividades_ilegales: Use of account for illegal or fraudulent activities

eliminacion_contenido_publico: Content removal: Removing user's public content
retencion_datos_requerimientos_legales: Data retention: Keeping certain data per legal requirements
retencion_datos_terminacion_periodos: After terminating your account, we retain certain data for following periods:
limitacion_responsabilidad_descripcion: To the maximum extent permitted by applicable law, our liability to you shall be limited as set forth in this section.
servicios_proporcionados_tal_cual: Services are provided "as is" and "as available", without warranties of any kind, either express or implied, including but not limited to warranties of merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose or non-infringement.
no_garantizamos_servicios_ininterrumpido: We do not guarantee that Services will be uninterrupted, secure or error-free.
maximo_monto_pagado_12_meses: Maximum of amount paid by you in last 12 months
ejemplos_perdida_beneficios_datos: Loss of profits, data or business opportunities
maximo_total_todos_reclamos: Maximum total for all related claims

indemnizacion_contenido_publicado_compar: Any content you post or share
jurisdicciones_exclusion_garantias_limit: Some jurisdictions do not allow exclusion of implied warranties or limitation of liability for consequential or incidental damages, so above limitations may not apply to you. In such situation, our liability shall be limited to maximum extent permitted by applicable law in your jurisdiction.
actualizacion_terminos_periodicamente: We may update these Terms of Service periodically to reflect changes in our services, industry practices or legal requirements. We will notify you about important changes and give you opportunity to review them before they take effect.
notificacion_cambios_importantes_mediant: We will notify you about important changes through:
uso_continudo_servicio_nuevos_terminos: Continued use of our Services after effective date constitutes acceptance of new terms.
aceptar_no_actividades_prohibidas: By using our Services, you agree not to perform any of the following prohibited activities:
privacy_privacidad_prioridad: At Aycoro, your privacy is our priority. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, share and protect your personal information when you use our services.
privacy_aceptacion_practicas: By using our application, you accept the practices described in this policy. If you don't agree with these terms, please don't use our services.
privacy_compromiso_proteccion_datos: We commit to protecting your privacy and being transparent about how we handle your data. We comply with GDPR and other applicable data protection laws.
privacy_recopilacion_tipos_informacion: We collect different types of information to provide and improve our services. This data includes:
privacy_bases_legales_procesamiento: We process your data based on: your consent, the necessity to execute a contract, comply with legal obligations, or our legitimate interests, provided your rights and freedoms do not prevail.
privacy_utilizamos_informacion_proposito: We use collected information for the following purposes:
privacy_gestionar_cuenta_autenticacion: Manage your account, authenticate users and provide basic functionalities
privacy_adaptar_contenido_recomendacione: Adapt content and recommendations according to your preferences and use
privacy_enviar_notificaciones_actualizac: Send notifications, updates and responses to your queries
privacy_prevenir_fraudes_abusos: Prevent fraud, abuse and illegal activities on our platform
privacy_respetar_leyes_solicitudes: Respect applicable laws and respond to legal requests
privacy_compartimos_datos_circunstancias: We share your personal data only under the following circumstances and with appropriate safeguards:
privacy_con_quien_compartimos_datos_titu: Who We Share Your Data With
privacy_proposito_proveedores_servicios: Web hosting, payment processing, data analysis
privacy_datos_compartidos_proveedores: Usage data, Transaction information, Analytics data
privacy_datos_compartidos_marketing: Email addresses, Behavioral data, Conversion statistics
privacy_ejemplos_desarrolladores_consult: Freelance developers, Design agencies, Technical consultants
privacy_datos_compartidos_desarrolladore: Technical data, User feedback, Error information
privacy_bases_legales_transferencias: All data transfers to third parties are conducted under one of the following legal bases:
privacy_contratos_procesamiento_datos: Data Processing Contracts: Agreements ensuring third parties protect your data
privacy_consentimiento_explicito: Explicit Consent: When you give us specific permission to share certain data
privacy_interes_legitimo: Legitimate Interest: To prevent fraud or comply with legal requests
privacy_obligacion_legal: Legal Obligation: When law requires us to share information
privacy_proveedores_servidores_externos: Some of our providers have servers outside the European Economic Area (EEA). In these cases, we use European Commission-approved standard contractual clauses or other appropriate safeguards to ensure a level of protection equivalent to GDPR.
privacy_medidas_tecnicas_organizativas: We implement robust technical and organizational measures to protect your personal data from unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure or destruction. Our security is based on multiple layers of protection:
privacy_descripcion_cifrado_datos: All data is transmitted and stored using 256-bit TLS/SSL encryption
privacy_descripcion_autenticacion_multip: Support for two-factor authentication (2FA) on all accounts
privacy_descripcion_copias_seguridad: Daily encrypted backups stored in geographically distributed locations
privacy_descripcion_monitoreo_continuo: Intrusion detection systems and 24/7 security monitoring
privacy_descripcion_control_accesos: Principle of least privilege and periodic permission reviews
privacy_descripcion_auditorias_regulares: Internal and external security audits conducted quarterly
privacy_plan_respuesta_incidentes: We have an incident response plan that includes:
privacy_deteccion_inmediata: Immediate detection: Monitoring systems that alert about suspicious activities
privacy_respuesta_rapida: Rapid response: Specialized team available 24/7 to contain incidents
privacy_notificacion_oportuna: Timely notification: Communication to affected users within maximum 72 hours
privacy_analisis_post_incidente: Post-incident analysis: Complete investigation to prevent future incidents
privacy_formacion_proteccion_datos: All our staff receive mandatory training in data protection and information security:
privacy_formacion_inicial: Initial training upon joining the company
privacy_simulaciones_phishing: Phishing and social engineering attack simulations
privacy_contribuir_proteger_datos: You can also contribute to protecting your data:
privacy_mantener_dispositivo_actualizado: Keep your device and applications updated
privacy_derechos_datos_personales: As a user, you have specific rights regarding your personal data. We explain how you can exercise them:
privacy_descripcion_derecho_acceso: Request a copy of your personal data
privacy_descripcion_derecho_eliminacion: Request deletion of your personal data
privacy_descripcion_derecho_portabilidad: Receive your data in structured format
privacy_descripcion_derecho_oposicion: Object to processing of your data
privacy_para_ejercer_derechos: To exercise any of these rights, you can:
privacy_herramientas_configuracion: Use tools in your account settings
privacy_respuesta_30_dias: We will respond to your request within 30 business days.
privacy_derecho_presentar_queja: If you believe we haven't properly handled your request or have violated your privacy rights, you have the right to file a complaint with your country's data protection authority.
privacy_uso_cookies_tecnologias: We use cookies and similar technologies to enhance your experience on our website, analyze traffic and personalize content. For more details on how we use these technologies, see our complete Cookie Policy.
privacy_cookies_esenciales: Essential Cookies: Required for basic website functionality
privacy_cookies_rendimiento: Performance Cookies: Analyze how you use our site
privacy_gestionar_preferencias_cookies: You can manage your cookie preferences at any time through:
privacy_adicional_cookies_utilizamos: In addition to cookies, we use other technologies:
privacy_proposito_local_storage: Store data locally in your browser
privacy_informacion_detallada_cookies: For detailed information about all cookies we use, their specific purposes, duration and how to manage them, see our complete Cookie Policy.
privacy_actualizacion_periodica_politica: This Privacy Policy may be updated periodically to reflect changes in our practices, services we offer or applicable laws. We recommend reviewing this page regularly to stay informed about how we protect your information.
privacy_modifican_practicas_recopilacion: We modify our data collection practices
privacy_notificacion_cambios_importantes: For important changes, we'll notify you through:
privacy_banner_destacado: A featured banner on our website
privacy_notificacion_push: Push notification in the mobile app
privacy_cambios_enero_2024: Added new security measures and updated international transfer information
privacy_cambios_octubre_2023: Included new user rights and exercise procedures
privacy_cambios_abril_2023: Complete update to comply with new data protection regulations
privacy_continuar_uso_servicios_actualiz: By continuing to use our services after changes to this policy are published, you accept updated terms. If you disagree with changes, you can:
privacy_contactarnos_ejercer_derechos: Contact us to exercise your rights
privacy_exportar_datos_cerrar_cuenta: Export your data before closing your account
privacy_archivo_versiones_anteriores: We maintain an archive of previous versions of this policy. If you want to know how we handled your data in the past, you can request a copy of previous versions.
cookies_uso_mejora_experiencia: In YourApp, we use cookies and similar technologies to improve your experience, analyze traffic, and personalize content. This policy explains what cookies are, how we use them, and how you can manage them.
cookies_aceptacion_uso_esenciales: By using our website, you accept the use of essential cookies. For non-essential cookies, we will ask for your explicit consent.
cookies_control_total_no_esenciales: You have full control over non-essential cookies. You can manage your preferences at any time through our consent tool or your browser settings.
cookies_descripcion_archivos_texto: Cookies are small text files that websites store on your device when you visit them. These files contain information used to improve your browsing experience.
cookies_descripcion_pequenos_archivos: Text fragments stored in your browser
cookies_descripcion_proposito_especifico: Each cookie has a specific function on the website
cookies_adicional_cookies_tradicionales: In addition to traditional cookies, we also use:
cookies_local_storage_desc: Local Storage: Local storage in the browser
cookies_session_storage_desc: Session Storage: Storage during the session
cookies_utilizamos_diferentes_tipos: We use different types of cookies according to their purpose and duration:
cookies_descripcion_rendimiento: Help us understand how visitors interact with the site
cookies_descripcion_funcionalidad: Allow remembering your preferences and choices
cookies_detallamos_cookies_especificas: Below we detail the specific cookies we use on our website:
cookies_propositos_especificos_mejoran: Cookies have specific purposes that enhance your experience on our website. Below we explain each one:
cookies_descripcion_funcionamiento_basic: Allow the website to function properly and enable smooth navigation between pages.
cookies_ejemplos_funcionamiento_basico: User authentication, Session maintenance, Shopping cart
cookies_descripcion_mejora_experiencia: Optimize your navigation by remembering your preferences and personal settings.
cookies_ejemplos_mejora_experiencia: Selected language, Design preferences, Regional settings
cookies_descripcion_analisis_estadistica: Help us understand how you interact with our site to improve our services.
cookies_ejemplos_analisis_estadisticas: Most visited pages, Time on site, Conversion rates
cookies_descripcion_publicidad_personali: Show relevant ads based on your interests and browsing behavior.
cookies_descripcion_seguridad_fraude: Protect your account and personal data from unauthorized access and fraudulent activities.
cookies_ejemplos_seguridad_fraude: Suspicious activity detection, Bot protection, Identity verification
cookies_consentimiento_explicito_no_esen: For non-essential cookies (performance, functionality, and advertising), we will always request your explicit consent before activating them. You can change your preferences at any time through our cookie manager.
cookies_opciones_gestionar_controlar: You have several options to manage and control cookies:
cookies_descripcion_herramienta_consenti: Use our built-in cookie manager to accept or reject specific categories
cookies_accion_herramienta_consentimient: Available in the footer of our site
cookies_descripcion_configuracion_navega: Most browsers allow blocking or deleting cookies
cookies_descripcion_herramientas_tercero: Extensions and programs that automatically manage cookies
cookies_descripcion_navegacion_privada: Use incognito mode to limit cookie storage
cookies_pasos_chrome: Menu → Settings, Privacy and security, Cookies and site data
cookies_pasos_firefox: Menu → Options, Privacy & Security, Cookies and Site Data
cookies_pasos_safari: Preferences → Privacy, Manage Website Data, Select and remove
cookies_pasos_edge: Menu → Settings, Privacy & services, Cookies and site permissions
cookies_adicional_cookies_propias: In addition to our own cookies, we use third-party cookies that help us analyze site usage, improve functionality, and provide additional services. These cookies are managed by the respective companies and are subject to their own privacy policies.
cookies_terceros_recopilar_informacion: Third-party cookies may collect information about your browsing behavior across different websites. We have no direct control over these cookies and recommend reviewing each provider's privacy policies to understand how your data is processed.
cookies_deshabilitar_cookies_terceros: You can disable third-party cookies through our cookie manager or via your browser settings.
cookies_proveedores_procesan_fuera_ue: Some third-party providers may process your data outside the European Union. In such cases, we ensure that adequate safeguards, such as standard contractual clauses approved by the European Commission, are in place to protect your personal data.
cookies_actualizacion_periodica_politica: This Cookie Policy may be updated periodically to reflect changes in our practices, applicable legislation, or in response to new features on our website. We recommend checking this page regularly to stay informed about how we use cookies.
cookies_revisamos_politica_anual: We review this policy at least once a year, but we may update it more frequently if:
cookies_implementar_nuevas_funcionalidad: We implement new features that require additional cookies
cookies_cambios_legislacion_proteccion: Significant changes occur in data protection legislation
cookies_notificacion_cambios_importantes: For important changes to this policy, we will notify you via:
cookies_banner_destacado_sitio: A prominent banner on our website
cookies_correo_proporcionado_direccion: Email (if you have provided us your address)
cookies_notificacion_aplicacion_movil: A notification in the mobile app
cookies_actualizacion_fecha_ultima_actua: Update of the "Last updated" date on this page
cookies_cambios_enero_2024: Added new third-party providers and updated information on international transfers
cookies_cambios_julio_2023: Implementation of the new cookie manager and category updates
cookies_cambios_enero_2023: Initial publication of the cookie policy
cookies_continuar_uso_sitio_aceptacion: By continuing to use our website after changes to this policy are published, you accept the updated terms. If you do not agree with the changes, you can adjust your cookie preferences or stop using our website.
politica_cookies_descripcion: Understand how we use cookies and similar technologies
politica_privacidad_descripcion: Understand how we protect and use your information
terminos_servicio_descripcion: Please read these terms carefully before using our services
gestionar_cookies_descripcion: Manage your cookie preferences at any time
centro_ayuda_descripcion: Find answers to your questions and get support
necesitas_mas_ayuda: Can't find what you're looking for?
intenta_otros_terminos: Try other search terms or explore other categories
contactar_equipo_soporte: Get in touch with our support team
respuesta_crear_publicacion: To create a post, click the "+" button in the navigation bar, select the image or video you want to publish, add a description, and click "Publish".
respuesta_editar_perfil: Go to your profile and click the "Edit profile" button. From there you can change your profile picture, username, bio, and other personal information.
respuesta_cambiar_contraseña: In your account settings, go to the "Security" section and select "Change password". Enter your current password and the new password.
respuesta_reportar_contenido: Click on the three dots (...) of the post and select "Report". Choose the reason for the report and submit it. Our team will review the content.
respuesta_aplicacion_gratuita: Yes, our app is completely free. We offer all basic features at no cost.
respuesta_eliminar_cuenta: Go to Settings > Account > Delete account. Note that this action is irreversible and you will lose all your data.
respuesta_funcionan_historias: Stories are temporary posts that disappear after 24 hours. You can create them from the home screen by tapping the "+" icon on your profile picture.
respuesta_problemas_conexion: Check your internet connection, restart the app, or try refreshing the page. If the problem persists, contact us.
respuesta_bloquear_usuario: Go to the user's profile, click on the three dots (...) and select "Block user". They won't be able to see your content or contact you.
usuario_eliminado: This user does not exist or has been deleted.
pagina_eliminada: This page does not exist or has been deleted.
no_notificaciones_descripcion: When you receive notifications, they will appear here
comparte_experiencia_servicio: Share your experience with this service...
contactaremos: We will contact you within 24-48 hours
propietario_servicio: Are you the owner of this service?
reclama_servicio: Claim your service and manage it
enviamos_codigo: We have sent a 6-digit code to
codigo_incorrecto: Incorrect code. Please check the code.
